name: python3-sse-starlette
title: python3-sse-starlette
summary: SSE plugin for Starlette and FastAPI (Python 3)
description:
SSE plugin for Starlette and FastAPI (Python 3)
Implements Server-Sent Events (SSE) implementation for Starlette and FastAPI,
enabling real-time event streaming from server to client.
.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Server-sent_events
.
Note: For using and working with the examples you will need to also install
packages listed as Suggests!
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sse-starlette because SSE plugin for Starlette and FastAPI (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sse-starlette as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sse-starlette with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sse-starlette --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
